name: Shakira
bio: Shakira's catalog continues to monetize globally through streaming, multilingual crossover appeal, and persistent playlist demand.
notable_for: Worldwide pop songs with durable rhythmic identity and replay value.
career_highlight: Her crossover catalog remains one of the strongest long-tail assets in modern Latin-pop adjacent music.
revenue_drivers: Global streaming keeps core singles active across markets.
Dance and workout playlists support repeat listening.
International recognition helps maintain long-tail demand.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Shakira's headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Shakira's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
